source_document.title: Ease of doing business measures – Relaxations in certain reporting requirements for certain Stock Brokers and doing away with the requirement of reporting of demat account

referenced_documents.title: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992

match_texts: Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025 (hereinafter mentioned as "Master Circular")
reference_mentions.evidence_text: 1. SEBI has specified provisions pertaining to enhanced supervision of Stock Brokers ("brokers")/Depository Participants ("DPs") under para 15 of Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025 (hereinafter mentioned as "Master Circular").
reference_mentions.confidence_reason: Full master circular title and issue date are present in the source paragraph.

reference_mentions.evidence_text: 2. In terms of para 15.3 of Master Circular, all demat accounts maintained by brokers should be appropriately tagged. However, the said requirement is not applicable for the demat accounts which are used exclusively for banking activities by brokers which are also banks.
reference_mentions.confidence_reason: Alias-only mention resolved from an earlier full-form citation in the same PDF.

reference_mentions.evidence_text: 3. Further, as per para 15.4 of Master Circular, brokers are required to inform Stock Exchanges of their existing and new bank accounts. However, broker which is also bank may be required to report to Stock Exchange only those bank accounts that are used for their stock broking activities. Further, brokers are required to inform Stock Exchange of existing and new demat accounts.
reference_mentions.confidence_reason: Alias-only mention resolved from an earlier full-form citation in the same PDF.

reference_mentions.evidence_text: as well as to promote ease of doing business for brokers by harmonizing and relaxing the reporting obligations, it has been decided to modify the relevant paras in Master Circular as under:
reference_mentions.confidence_reason: Alias-only mention resolved from an earlier full-form citation in the same PDF.

match_texts: Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025
Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025 shall continue to remain applicable
reference_mentions.evidence_text: 5. Accordingly, Paras 15.3 and 15.4 of Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025 stand amended to the extent of para 4 as detailed above. All other provisions specified in Master Circular for Stock Brokers dated June 17, 2025 shall continue to remain applicable.
reference_mentions.confidence_reason: Full master circular title and issue date are present in the source paragraph.

match_texts: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
